# Nondischargeable Debts in Bankruptcy -- Guide [2026]
> Which debts survive bankruptcy? Tax debts, student loans, fraud, alimony, and more. Complete guide to nondischargeable debts. 2026.

## About
nondischargeable.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Nondischargeable Debts List -- Complete Guide to Debts That Survive Bankruptcy: https://nondischargeable.org/nondischargeable-debts-list.html
- Adversary Proceedings to Determine Dischargeability -- Nondischargeable: https://nondischargeable.org/adversary-proceeding.html
- Debts from Fraud -- Section 523(a)(2) -- Nondischargeable: https://nondischargeable.org/fraud-debts.html
- Nondischargeable Debts in Bankruptcy -- Guide: https://nondischargeable.org/
- The Complete List of 19 Nondischargeable Debts in Bankruptcy: https://nondischargeable.org/list-of-19.html
- Personal Injury Judgments and Bankruptcy Discharge -- Nondischargeable: https://nondischargeable.org/personal-injury.html
- Is Criminal Restitution Dischargeable in Bankruptcy? -- Nondischargeable: https://nondischargeable.org/restitution.html
- Student Loans in Bankruptcy -- Section 523(a)(8) -- Nondischargeable: https://nondischargeable.org/student-loans.html
- Domestic Support Obligations -- Section 523(a)(5) -- Nondischargeable: https://nondischargeable.org/support-obligations.html
- Tax Debts in Bankruptcy -- Section 523(a)(1) -- Nondischargeable: https://nondischargeable.org/tax-debts.html
- Willful and Malicious Injury -- Section 523(a)(6) -- Nondischargeable: https://nondischargeable.org/willful-injury.html

## Contact
- Website: https://openbankruptcyproject.org
- Email: contact@openbankruptcyproject.org
- GitHub: https://github.com/openbankruptcyproject

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
